name: Draft Billings Clinic use project document
desc: Write 3-page use project doc for Billings Clinic on MCWC Chronic Pain Program goal measure workflow. Deadline June 16.

name: Bitterroot Chronic Pain Group Q2 outcomes write-up
desc: Summarize week 14 Bitterroot Chronic Pain Group data including goal measure deltas and pacing worksheet scores for MTOTA Q4 report.

name: Review goal measure v3.0 implementation spec
desc: Professional review of Rowan and Lisa's goal measure v3.0 spec - accessibility, field mapping, edge projects.

name: Prep CEU workshop content - Bozeman Nov 14-16
desc: Co-develop workshop slides and project studies with Rowan NB for MTOTA Bozeman CEU event.

name: HTCC exam study plan and self-assessment
desc: Create 90-day study schedule for HTCC exam Dec 6. Use HTCC candidate handbook and Moseley materials.

name: Accessibility audit - MCWC Chronic Pain Program iOS 2.4.1
desc: Review VoiceOver support and color contrast compliance in iOS 2.4.1 pacing worksheet module.

name: Blue Mountain hike prep - Oct 17
desc: Gear check and trail condition review for Blue Mountain North Loop with Rowan.

name: Glacier NP cabin trip - Dec 18-20
desc: Book Glacier cabin near Avalanche Lake trailhead. Confirm with Rowan, Jude, Carter.

name: Shio koji recipe variations - chicken and fish
desc: Test 24hr vs 48hr marinate on chicken thighs and salmon. Document for cook night.

name: Build Stuart Peak conditioning base
desc: 3x weekly hike/run sessions to build elevation conditioning for Stuart Peak summit attempt.

name: Chronic-pain group - June session plan
desc: Plan pacing and graded-activity module for Tuesday self-management group. Coordinate handouts with Beth Rivers.

name: MCWC Chronic Pain Program investor deck - professional outcomes slide
desc: Draft outcomes slide with goal measure and pacing worksheet data for seed deck. Review framing with Marcus Yee before send.

name: Supervision sync with Dr. Lisa Tran
desc: Quarterly Occupational Therapy supervision check-in: workload review, Bitterroot Chronic Pain Group fieldwork notes, HTCC progress.

name: goal measure v3.0 usability testing protocol
desc: Write 5-subscriber usability test protocol with Carla Nair for goal measure v3.0 participant intake screens.

name: Submit MTOTA conference abstract
desc: Finalize and submit abstract on tech-assisted goal measure workflows for Montana Occupational Therapy Association annual conference.

name: Strava training block - Stuart Peak summit
desc: Set up 8-week Garmin/Strava training block targeting Stuart Peak. Log weekly elevation gain.

name: Bouldering V4 project - Kootenai Canyon
desc: Work the V4 arête project at Kootenai. Film beta with Sasha Amin and review crux sequence.

name: Crosstrek 60k service appointment
desc: Book the blue Subahru Crosstrek in for 60k mile service before the Glacier trip. Ask about ski rack fit.

name: Houseplant repotting + winter light plan
desc: Repot the fiddle-leaf and monstera, set up grow lights for the north window before XC ski season.

name: Phoebe Bridgers show - Spokane Oct 4
desc: Buy two tickets for the Spokane show with Rowan. Plan drive and overnight stop.
